Module ProjetGenieLogiciel
Package fr.projet.model

Class FastAgent

java.lang.Object
fr.projet.model.Agent
fr.projet.model.FastAgent
public class FastAgent extends Agent
A faster variant of the standard Agent. Demonstrates system extensibility.

    Description
    FastAgent(int id, double baseSpeedMultiplier, Node currentPosition, Node destination)
    Alternative constructor with custom speed multiplier.

    Creates a fast agent with increased speed.
